# Wallert

> Turn a wallet into a silent alarm.

Wallert is a free, open-source, privacy-first crypto security app. It monitors a dedicated wallet and instantly alerts your trusted contacts if a transfer is made under physical duress (home invasion, kidnapping, forced transfer).

## How it works

1. Set aside a dedicated wallet with a credible amount, placed under 24/7 surveillance.
2. Define your emergency contacts (email, Telegram) and your emergency instructions.
3. Under duress, transfer the funds from this wallet. Wallert detects the transfer and triggers a silent alert.
4. Your trusted circle receives the alert with your instructions. Alerts are resent every 5 minutes until someone confirms receipt.

## Key features

- Real-time blockchain monitoring (Ethereum via Alchemy)
- Alert channels: email and Telegram
- Recurring alerts every 5 minutes until acknowledged
- Privacy-first: anonymous registration, isolated wallet, anonymous Telegram groups
- Open source: full code transparency on GitHub
- Self-hostable: run your own instance for full control

## What Wallert does NOT do

- Wallert does not prevent attacks or theft
- Wallert does not guarantee police intervention
- Wallert breaks the silence as fast as possible so your trusted contacts can act

## Tech stack

- Next.js 14, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Alchemy, Resend, Telegram Bot API
- Hosted on Scaleway VPS with Cloudflare DDoS protection
- MIT License

## Links

- Website: https://wallert.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/rmdls2b/wallert
- About / Story: https://wallert.app/about
- Contact: contact@wallert.app

## Founded by

Rémi D'Alise -- Founder of "Protégez vos cryptos" (www.remidalise.com). Former Head of Product at Ledger (6 years). Since 2024, crypto security consultant helping individuals protect their digital assets.

---

# Wallert (Francais)

> Transformez un wallet en alarme silencieuse.

Wallert est une application gratuite, open source et privacy-first pour la securite crypto. Elle surveille un wallet dedie et alerte instantanement vos contacts de confiance si un transfert est effectue sous la contrainte physique (home-jacking, enlevement, transfert force).

## Comment ca marche

1. Dediez un wallet avec un montant credible, place sous surveillance 24/7.
2. Definissez vos contacts d urgence (email, Telegram) et vos instructions d urgence.
3. Sous la contrainte, transferez les fonds depuis ce wallet. Wallert detecte le transfert et declenche une alerte silencieuse.
4. Votre cercle de confiance recoit l alerte avec vos instructions. Les alertes sont renvoyees toutes les 5 minutes jusqu a ce qu un contact confirme la prise en charge.

## Caracteristiques principales

- Surveillance blockchain en temps reel (Ethereum via Alchemy)
- Canaux d alerte : email et Telegram
- Alertes recurrentes toutes les 5 minutes jusqu a confirmation
- Privacy-first : inscription anonyme, wallet isole, groupes Telegram anonymes
- Open source : code entierement transparent sur GitHub
- Auto-hebergeable : deployez votre propre instance pour un controle total

## Ce que Wallert ne fait PAS

- Wallert n empeche ni les agressions ni les vols
- Wallert ne garantit pas l intervention de la police
- Wallert brise le silence le plus rapidement possible pour que vos contacts puissent agir

## Fondateur

Rémi D'Alise -- Fondateur de "Protégez vos cryptos" (www.remidalise.com). Ancien Head of Product chez Ledger (6 ans). Depuis 2024, consultant en securite crypto accompagnant des particuliers dans la protection de leurs actifs numeriques.
